violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per PIC, a work order has been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
The outside compactor was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
Multiple ceiling tiles in the storefront area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The floors in the walk-in cooler have accumulation of white residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
